items.definition_en: A period of fifteen minutes.
items.example_en: The break will last a quarter-hour.

items.definition_en: A period of thirty minutes.
items.example_en: Dinner will be ready in a half-hour.

items.definition_en: A period of two weeks.
items.example_en: I'll see you in a fortnight.

items.definition_en: The time when the sun appears in the morning.
items.example_en: I enjoy watching the sunrise at the beach.

items.definition_en: The time when the sun goes down in the evening.
items.example_en: We took a walk at sunset.

items.definition_en: A day from Monday to Friday.
items.example_en: I wake up early on every weekday.

items.definition_en: A year with 366 days instead of 365.
items.example_en: The next leap year will be in four years.

items.definition_en: A day on which most people go to work.
items.example_en: It was a busy workday for everyone.

items.definition_en: A day when students attend school.
items.example_en: The school day starts at eight o'clock.

items.definition_en: The time when traffic is busy because people are traveling to or from work.
items.example_en: The trains are crowded during rush hour.

items.definition_en: The time of day when people traditionally drink tea.
items.example_en: They always meet for a chat at tea time.

items.definition_en: A short period when you stop working or studying to rest.
items.example_en: Let's meet outside at break time.

items.definition_en: A short sleep taken in the early afternoon.
items.example_en: He takes a siesta after lunch every day.

items.definition_en: The day when someone receives their salary.
items.example_en: Everyone looks forward to payday.

items.definition_en: The period during which someone is alive.
items.example_en: It was an experience of a lifetime.

items.definition_en: The final time or date by which something must be completed.
items.example_en: The project deadline is next Monday.

items.definition_en: A long and distinct period of history.
items.example_en: The computer era changed daily life.

items.definition_en: A period of time between two events.
items.example_en: There was a short interval before the second act.

items.definition_en: A period of one thousand years.
items.example_en: The city celebrated the new millennium with fireworks.

items.definition_en: The day or night before an event.
items.example_en: It was Christmas Eve.
